name: HELICOBACTER PYLORI INFECTION

demographics.Prevalence: increasing with age; in > 50% of Americans > 60 years of age
demographics.Path: surface epithelial damage + inflammation with mucosal infiltration by neutrophils,
demographics.Location: gastric antrum > proximal half of stomach

distribution: gastric antrum > proximal half of stomach
discriminating_features: gastric ulcer (60-80% prevalence of H. pylori)

general: gastric ulcer (60-80% prevalence of H. pylori)
duodenal ulcer (90-100% prevalence of H. pylori)
